blended.narrative: Mount Snow is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,419 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Monday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
